innovation_1.name: 基于几何特征的三层角信号分解与非朗伯体检测机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that complex non-Lambertian surfaces can be effectively separated and analyzed by dissecting geometric features through a three-layer angular signal decomposition.

innovation_2.name: 统一双掩码物理模型与多领域平衡训练策略
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a unified dual-mask physical model integrated with a multi-domain balanced training strategy that leverages the decomposed signals to optimize the learning process.
